posts.author: ClareWells
posts.text: Just signed up for the Dunmere Amateur Jazz Orchestra! 🎷 Been playing sax since school and finally getting into a local band. First rehearsal is next Tuesday at 7pm in the old community hall. Can't wait to meet everyone! #Jazz #LocalMusic
posts.explanation: The post describes a harmless hobby, personal achievement, and public event without sharing sensitive data or promoting harm.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.
